sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107207" key="u(peraio/lios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπεραιόλιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n107207.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hyper-Aeolian,</tr_> in Music, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alyp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Diat.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
